nurtureTemplates.value_drop:
Hi {{name}},

I'm {{botName}}, assisting the clinic of {{tenantName}}.

I noticed you were asking about health resources. Quick tip: The biggest mistake people make in modern healthcare is treating symptoms instead of root causes. Finding a practitioner who listens for more than 7 minutes can completely change your long-term prognosis.

No pitch, just wanted to share that perspective.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.testimonial:
Hi {{name}},

Quick story — {{tenantName}} just reviewed some labs for a patient who had been told for years that their fatigue was "normal."

Turns out, it wasn't. They adjusted one specific biomarker based on our protocol, and the patient feels a decade younger.

The right diagnostic approach matters.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.authority_transfer:
Hi {{name}},

I want to properly introduce you to {{tenantName}}.

They have been practicing in {{profession}} for {{years}}. Their biggest recent advance: {{biggestWin}}. What makes their clinic different: {{differentiator}}.

We don't operate like a typical high-volume facility. We focus intensely on {{icp}}.

If you fall into that category, an initial consultation is incredibly valuable.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.personal_checkin:
Hi {{name}},

Just checking in — how are you feeling lately?

No agenda here. {{tenantName}} just likes to ensure we keep a pulse on the people reaching out to our clinic.

Anything improved on your end?

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.one_to_ten_part1:
Hi {{name}},

Quick question regarding your health.

On a scale of 1-10, how prioritized is addressing your current concern right now? (1 = I can live with it, 10 = I need to see a specialist immediately).

Just reply with a number.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.one_to_ten_part2:
Thank you for sharing that.

What would it take to be a 10? Are you waiting on insurance, trying home remedies first, or just anxious about what the diagnosis might be?

I just want to make sure we're providing the best guidance.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.gap_closing:
I completely understand — {{answer}}.

That's very valid, and {{tenantName}} actively accounts for that in the patient onboarding process. It's exactly why we emphasize our {{biggestWin}} approach.

Does knowing we have a specific pathway to address that change your 1-10 urgency?

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.scarcity_takeaway:
Hi {{name}},

I'll be straightforward — {{tenantName}} strictly limits new patient intake to maintain high-quality care for our existing roster.

If you're wanting to get on the schedule, let me know. If you've decided to hold off, that's okay too! I just want to manage our availability.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.pattern_interrupt:
Hi {{name}},

Before I close your file, think about this.

We service our cars every 5,000 miles, but often ignore our bodies until the check-engine light is physically smoking. 

Preventative care is always cheaper and less painful than reactive care. 

If you're ready to actually take look under the hood with {{tenantName}}, just say "Book me."

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.final_takeaway:
Hi {{name}},

This will be my final message. I'm removing you from my active patient follow-up.

{{tenantName}} is focused on patients currently under their care. We wish you the absolute best in health!

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.slow_drip_value:
Hi {{name}},

Checking in — just passing along some wellness info.

{{tenantName}} has been seeing great results focusing on {{differentiator}}. 

Hope you are staying healthy. Reach out if you ever need us!

— {{botName}}
